chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-5137/2021 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For order on CMA No.22708/2021 2. For order on CMA No.22191/2021 10.09.2021 Mr. Rafiq Ahmed Kalwar advocate for petitioners. Mr. Aamir Latif advocate for respondent NPB................ 1. Urgency granted. 2. By consent allowed. Accordingly respondents shall ensure that all benefits are received within three months in three installments commencing from 1st October 2021. Hence order dated 31.08.2021 is modified in addition of this order. J U D G E J U D G E IK
